summary: WhatsApp Integration with Twilio Provider fully tested. All 40 backend tests passed. Provider abstraction architecture verified - TwilioWhatsAppProvider correctly inherits from WhatsAppProviderBase. WhatsApp is in MOCK MODE (no Twilio credentials configured). System gracefully handles missing credentials - whatsapp_configured returns false. Appointment creation and scheduler jobs work without errors when WhatsApp not configured.
context_for_next_testing_agent: WhatsApp integration complete with Twilio provider in MOCK MODE. To activate WhatsApp, add TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM to backend/.env. Provider abstraction allows easy addition of Gupshup, Meta providers later.

whatsapp_provider_architecture.notes: TwilioWhatsAppProvider inherits from WhatsAppProviderBase, implements all abstract methods (send, send_bulk, validate_config, is_available, get_template_status)

whatsapp_service_convenience_methods.notes: WhatsAppService has send_appointment_confirmation, send_appointment_reminder, send_payment_receipt, is_configured methods

whatsapp_templates.notes: Templates for appointment_confirmation, appointment_reminder, payment_receipt exist. No clinical content in templates.

channel_availability_api.notes: whatsapp_configured correctly returns false when Twilio not configured

appointment_creation_whatsapp_trigger.notes: Appointment creation works without errors when WhatsApp not configured. WhatsApp trigger is wrapped in try-except for graceful skip.

scheduler_whatsapp_reminder.notes: Scheduler jobs import WhatsAppService, check is_configured(), call send_appointment_reminder. All wrapped in try-except.

whatsapp_opt_in_requirement.notes: WhatsApp requires explicit user opt-in (notification_opt_in.whatsapp = true). Default is False.

whatsapp_registry_configuration.notes: Registry correctly returns is_configured=False and get_provider=None without active providers

phone_number_normalization.notes: Phone numbers correctly normalized to +91XXXXXXXXXX format

whatsapp_data_models.notes: WhatsAppMessage and WhatsAppResult models have all required fields

whatsapp_twilio.reason: Twilio credentials not configured (TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID, TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN, TWILIO_WHATSAPP_FROM are empty)
whatsapp_twilio.activation_steps: Add Twilio credentials to backend/.env to activate WhatsApp
